non_permanence_notice: This registry is a routing seed, not a promise of permanent availability. Every source and every candidate URL must be reverified in the execution context; unverified, blocked, stale, or session-bound state must never be silently promoted to qualified.

families.label: First-party brand, creator, director and production-company sources
bias_notes: Strongest provenance but fragmented discovery and inconsistent archives.
families.default_fallback_strategy: Use accountable credit or award pages to discover the owner, then return to the first-party item.

families.label: Advertising craft and credit databases
bias_notes: Editorial selection can overrepresent globally networked agencies and English-language work.
families.default_fallback_strategy: Cross-check campaign identity on first-party, award, or official-distribution pages.

families.label: Advertising and design award archives
bias_notes: Award selection measures jury preference, not universal effectiveness or current relevance.
families.default_fallback_strategy: Use credits to reach owner pages; use regional archives to correct geography bias.

families.label: Film frame and cinematography references
bias_notes: Useful for visual grammar but not evidence of advertising performance or reuse rights.
families.default_fallback_strategy: Verify film identity through accountable editorial or official production sources.

families.label: Design, packaging and communication-art portfolios
bias_notes: Portfolio presentation can obscure commercial context and campaign chronology.
families.default_fallback_strategy: Follow creator and client credits to first-party case studies.

families.label: Fashion, model and editorial image sources
bias_notes: Editorial novelty and celebrity signals can dominate transferable craft value.
families.default_fallback_strategy: Confirm issue, show, photographer or director through official publisher and creator pages.

families.label: Architecture, set, interior and production-design sources
bias_notes: Static documentation can omit temporal, production and budget constraints.
families.default_fallback_strategy: Use project credits to locate architect, production designer or photographer sources.

families.label: Motion-design and CG craft sources
bias_notes: Craft showcases can privilege spectacle over brief relevance.
families.default_fallback_strategy: Verify the specific work and player on studio or official campaign pages.

families.label: Curated film, director and culture platforms
bias_notes: Curation taste is valuable but not neutral and may underrepresent commercial variants.
families.default_fallback_strategy: Trace director and production credits to first-party work pages.

families.label: Current advertising transparency and inspiration libraries
bias_notes: Coverage, retention and regional visibility vary by platform and policy.
families.default_fallback_strategy: Cross-check advertiser identity and creative on another transparency surface or first-party account.

families.label: Social and visual-discovery platforms
bias_notes: Reposts, unstable URLs, algorithmic ranking and missing credits make these discovery leads, not final provenance.
families.default_fallback_strategy: Use reverse search, account graph and credit graph to reach an accountable owner before qualification.

families.label: Regional advertising award archives
bias_notes: Regional archives correct global-platform bias but may have older interfaces or incomplete media.
families.default_fallback_strategy: Cross-check winner identity and media on agency, brand or production-company pages.

families.label: Photography editorial, competitions and photographer discovery
bias_notes: Editorial and competition selection can favor art photography over transferable commercial craft.
families.default_fallback_strategy: Trace photographer, publication and project credits to accountable first-party pages.

families.label: Photographer, director, stylist and production representation directories
bias_notes: Representation rosters favor established markets and do not prove rights clearance.
families.default_fallback_strategy: Verify the specific work on the represented talent or production-company page.
